sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_sum_map(    event_date Date,    event_time DateTime,    status_map Nested(        status UInt8,        request_count UInt8    )) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY event_date;
SELECT event_date, toTypeName(sumMap(status_map.status, status_map.request_count)), toTypeName(sumMapWithOverflow(status_map.status, status_map.request_count)) FROM test_sum_map GROUP BY event_date;
UPDATE test_sum_map SET status_map = [3, 5], request_count = [10, 25] WHERE event_date = '2023-10-01' AND event_time = '2023-10-01 10:01:00';
SELECT event_date, event_time, sumMapWithOverflow(status_map.status, status_map.request_count) FROM test_sum_map WHERE event_date = '2023-10-01' ORDER BY event_time;
